narrative:
Plain township has 26,243 registered voters, with 52.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.5%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.6 percentage points.
